title: Ennatha Solla Lyrics Endrendrum Punnagai Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ennatha solla
Singer(s): Karthik, Haricharan, Velmurugan, Ramesh Vinayagam
Movie: Endrendrum Punnagai
Music: Harris Jayaraj
Lyrics: Viveka

Ennatha solla innum ennatha solla
solla varthaye illa
nimmadhi illa ini nimmadhi illa
ponnu life long tholla (2)

Mayil pola varuvaa
puduhu podha tharuva
nee ponnoda serndhaale
mannaavaa maamaa ..

Ammi midhikka vacha karanam enna
konjam enni paarudaa maamaa ..
ava unna midhika seiyum othigadhaaney
nalla purinjika da maamaa.

Vela bendu mimithi, unna kandapadithaan
ava aati padaipaa maamaa .
ava kaluthulathaan manja kayira katti
namma maati kollurom aamaa ..(Ennatha solla )

Happy man-ah paartha arumugam ippa
BP-u vandhu paduthuputtaan
coffee tea-a kooda kayil thodaa nanben
quaterula kulichiduraan

Ye ponnum poli ava lifeum poli
oru noolu thaali adhil neeyum gaali
torture-u da ponu torture-u da

endha marriage-umey iruttu
batchlore-a neeum kootathadichaa
nee sollvadhellaam right-u ..(Ennatha solla )

Otha thalagaani pudhumada saami
kattikitte thoongikollalaam
vaaiku rushiyaaga vakkanaya thinna
cook-u onnu vachi kollalaam

chinna raagam theera, ... venaam
oru roata thaanda aeroplane-u vendaam

Moochu mutta neeyum kudichiputtu
poi moolayila thoongu
pechu thuna venumuna
nalla radio va vaangu (..Ennatha solla..)

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennatha Solla'?

The song 'Ennatha Solla' expresses the feelings of love and the joy of being together, highlighting the beauty of romantic relationships.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Endrendrum Punnagai, the song plays during a romantic sequence, showcasing the chemistry between the lead characters as they celebrate their love.

Who are the singers of 'Ennatha Solla'?

The song features talented singers including Haricharan, Karthik, Ramesh Vinayagam, and Velmurugan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for 'Ennatha Solla' was composed by Harrish Jeyaraj, known for his melodious tunes and engaging compositions.

When was 'Ennatha Solla' released?

'Ennatha Solla' was released on October 27, 2013, as part of the movie Endrendrum Punnagai.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song 'Ennatha Solla' from the movie Endrendrum Punnagai encapsulates the joyous essence of love and companionship. With its upbeat melody and engaging lyrics, it portrays the excitement and happiness of being in a romantic relationship. The collaboration of talented singers brings a vibrant energy that resonates with listeners. This song is perfect for celebrations and romantic occasions, making it a delightful addition to any playlist.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennatha Solla from Endrendrum Punnagai is a vibrant celebration of love, featuring an electrifying collaboration between renowned singers Haricharan, Karthik, and Velmurugan. With Harrish Jeyaraj's captivating music and Viveka's heartfelt lyrics, this song perfectly captures the essence of romance and joy. Get ready to immerse yourself in a melodious journey that resonates with every lover's heart!
stanzaMeanings: What can I say, there is nothing to say anymore, there is no peace, there is no peace in a woman's life, it will always be a struggle.
Will you come like a peacock, will you give something new, if you join with the girl, it will be a big deal, uncle..
If you think about the reason for the trouble, just look at it a little, uncle.. she will only make you suffer, understand it well, uncle.
I saw you and got scared, she will create a scene, uncle. In her anger, she will tie us up and we will get caught, uncle.. (What can I say)
Seeing a happy man, Arumugam is now stressed, he is drinking coffee and tea, I will be in the quarter and take a bath.
Oh, the girl is beautiful, her life is also beautiful, a single thread tied in a knot, you are also a breeze, it’s torture, it’s torture.
If any marriage is a dark bachelor, if you gather, whatever you say is right.. (What can I say)
Let’s tie the knot and sleep, we can eat quickly, let’s cook something and eat it.
Let the small tune end, ... I don’t want a route, I don’t want an airplane.
You drink and sleep, let’s talk nonsense, we need a good radio, let’s get it.. (What can I say)
